race.comment: SOVEREIGN SALUTE (3) was a strong winner at Bunbury when running over the top to score impressively over 1400m. Out in trip slightly now, but he rates highly on the maiden win and there's no reason why he can't go on with the job. CAN'T CATCH ME (7) led them up at Belmont last start and was too strong out in front, winning by 0.5L. It wouldn't surprise to see her lead once again from the draw and if she can raise the bar again out in trip, she'll be hard to reel in. JAZALOT (4) is racing well without winning, finishing 1.8L away over 1400m at Bunbury most recently. The inside draw is a big tick for his chances and he can put himself into the finish. WINNING SHUFFLE (8) is worth including on recent form. ICANDOIT ONMYOWN (11) wasn't beaten far last start and has claims.
